content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-012)

## Closest to completion — prioritize
1. **B4 `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` (L2445) — THE critical-path crux.** Closing it makes B5
   (`tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul`) automatically axiom-clean (B5's own body is already sorry-free;
   sorryAx traces SOLELY to B4 — lean_verify + auditor confirmed). Single highest-leverage target.
   - **Route (exact, from prover task result):** lift the `tensorPowAdd_zero_right` (~L2540) bridge-
     telescoping recipe to the `.val` presheaf-morphism level. `tensorObjAssoc` unfolds (verified via
     `simp only [tensorObjAssoc, …]`) to the 5-segment composite
     `(tensorObjIso (A⊗B) C).inv ≫ ((tensorObjIso A B).inv ▷ C) ≫ (α_ A B C).hom ≫
      (A ◁ (tensorObjIso B C).hom) ≫ (tensorObjIso A (B⊗C)).hom` taken to `.val`. Steps: distribute
     `.val` over `≪≫`; rewrite each whiskered bridge vs the sheafification unit `η` via
     `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` (right- and braiding-conjugated left- forms) +
     `Localization.Monoidal.{μ,associator}`; cancel adjacent `tensorObjIso` pairs by the FULL-DEFEQ
     `simp only` recipe (`Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc` / `whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc` /
     `hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc`).
   - Mode suggestion: `prove` (not fine-grained) — it is one multi-step telescoping, not a decomposition.
     If it stalls on a specific bridge segment, effort-break B4 at the segment seam.

2. **B7 ingredient (2): the μ-naturality-slide lemma (NEW, to introduce).** B7
   `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (L2658) assembles from B5 + this slide + B6. Introduce it as its own named
   lemma — analogue of B2/B3 (`sectionsMul_whiskerRight_unit`/`whiskerLeft_unit`) but with a general
   comparison `Γ(μ)` in place of the single unit `η`. Then B7 assembles mirroring `sectionsMul_mul_one`
   (`hμn0` → element identity → `sectionsCast_self`). Blueprint this slide lemma first (no block yet).

3. **B6 `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (L2640) — canonical pentagon.** SOUND ∀L (both bracketings = SAME
   permutation, unlike the comm hexagon). Route: pentagon induction on `m`, direct analogue of the
   fully-proven `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`, collapsing to `MonoidalCategory.pentagon` after the whisker-
   bridge rewrites + adjacent-bridge cancellation. Independent of B4 — can run in parallel.

## Reusable proof patterns (this session)
- **B5-assembly recipe** (apply to B7): `rw [← <whiskerRight-unit>, ← <whiskerLeft-unit>]` exposes the
  whiskered-unit composites, then `congrArg ((·.app ⊤).hom <elt>) <morphism-factorization-lemma>`,
  then `rfl` on the objectwise-associator residual (presheaf associator at ⊤ = ModuleCat associator).
- **Morphism-level whisker-unit legs close by `rfl`** when the `⊗ₜ` is driven through an enclosing
  `.hom` application (never a bare annotated `⊗ₜ[forget₂-ring]`): `whiskerRight_app`/`whiskerLeft_app`
  (`@[simp] rfl`) + ModuleCat `whisker*_apply` (`rfl`) + `sectionsMul = η.app (op ⊤)` (def `rfl`).

## DO NOT re-assign
- **Comm chain** (`sectionsMul_mul_comm` L2730, `tensorPowAdd_comm` L2709,
  `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` L2695). All `[IsInvertible L]`-gated FUTURE work,
  auditor-confirmed producer-only (no Lean consumer anywhere — `GCommSemiring` unbuilt). Re-anchored
  iter-011; the general-`L` statement is mathematically FALSE (free tensor algebra). Build only when a
  `GCommSemiring` consumer materializes.
- **χ leg** (`QuotScheme.lean`, 4 sorries) — deferred to the cohomology leg at merge. Not a prover lane.

## MEDIUM — blueprint/hygiene (both auditors flagged; for the planner / blueprint-writer)
- **Stale comm comment, L2745–2757 of `SectionGradedRing.lean`** (Lean→bp, both auditors, MAJOR).
  The comment still calls the `sectionsMul_mul_comm` signature "arbitrary `L`/unsound" and attacks a
  "Mac Lane discharges the hexagon" blueprint claim the chapter already disavows. The signature is now
  correctly `[IsInvertible L]`-gated; only the Lean comment is outdated. Next prover touching the comm
  region should refresh it (review agent cannot edit `.lean`).
- **Dangling `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer` + coequalizer coverage gap** (bp→Lean, both auditors,
  MAJOR/coverage). Lean docstrings in `SectionGradedRing.lean` cite `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer`,
  which has no `\label` in `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`; the ~15 relative-tensor coequalizer bricks
  (the `RelativeTensorCoequalizer` namespace) have no `\lean{}` blueprint blocks. Dispatch a
  blueprint-writer to add the coequalizer-construction blocks + the missing label, restoring 1-to-1
  coverage. (Review agent does not author informal prose.)

## LOW (summary notes)
- Auditor: 5 minor (stale historical planning-comment blocks, `show`-style instances) — non-blocking hygiene.
- Blueprint doctor: all findings in DEFERRED chapters (out-of-cone, resolve at merge). Active chapter clean.
